This estimate is based on updated H2S concentration data that was used in the engineering estimate.  Disposed with produced water via deep underground injection and is not released to the surface environment.

Methanol is injected at wellsites in the field to prevent freezing and to break down hydrates. Approximately 75% of the methanol injection that occurs in the field is transferred with the gas, via pipelines, to the plant where it is spearated into the pro

Methanol is injected at wellsites in the field to prevent freezing and, to breakdown hydrates.  Approximately 75 % of the methanol injection that occurs in the field is transferred with the gas, via pipelines, to the plant where it is seperated into the p

When the gas reaches the plant the liquids are seperated out to the produced water tank.  Trace amounts of hydrogen sulphide remain entrained in the produced water.  As a result, it is transferred offsite for underground injection with the produced water.
